programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls break the bank as they perform in a pageant of dresses made out of money.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A look back at the highlights, low-lights and previously unseen footage from the first 12 episodes.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The remaining three queens face their final challenge when they're asked to transform into video vixens for the music video to Ru's latest single, 'Champion'.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Wigs fly off as the queens return to discuss the drama of the season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A new cast of queens survive a game of Ru Light, Green Light, before showing off their skills.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The second half of the new cast of 14 queens, competing to be crowned America's Next Drag Superstar, must show off their performance skills in a talent show; rapper and singer Doechii guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens take fashion inspiration from the board game Monopoly and must create from scratch an outfit that screams that they own everything; actress and comedian Sandra Bernhard becomes a guest judge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens receive the task of singing songs based on memorable moments from "Drag Race" history; actress Julia Schlaepfer guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to serve up laughs in a hilarious send-up of the iconic sketch comedy show; actor, writer and director Paul W. Downs is the guest judge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the queens put their design skills to the test in a pageant of ocean-inspired couture and showcase three fishy looks; actress and model Hunter Schafer and stylist Law Roach gue.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities; Global All Stars winner Alyssa Edwards drops by the werkroom; actress and comedian Quinta Brunson guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.sub-title: The Wicked Wiz of Oz: The Rusical!
programme.desc: This season's Rusical is inspired by a mashup of "Wicked, The Wizard of Oz" and "The Wiz." Jamal Sims choreographs the queens; singer Adam Lambert guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: After the Reading challenge, the queens rock out with their frocks out, as they create a look worthy of a Betsey Johnson fashion collection; Betsey Johnson guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens pay a comedy tribute to three of the shadiest queens in Drag Race herstory, Kandy Muse, Mistress Isabelle Brooks and Plane Jane.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: As a tribute to Truman Capote and his Swans, the queens must act up a storm in a high camp tale of betrayal; Cheyenne Jackson directs; singer Sam Smith guest judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens share true stories in a performance challenge with a twist; their partners must act out the stories through interpretive dance; Jerrod Carmichael guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens make over some extra special drag newbies: their moms and dads; June Diane Raphael ("Grace and Frankie") guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens audition to star in RuPaul's Drag Race LIVE! at Flamingo Las Vegas; Tracee Ellis Ross ("Black-ish") guest judges.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An efficiency expert drives Janet to quit.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cindy invites the trio for a weekend on the farm.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack substitutes for a chef and winds up with a full-time job.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack adopts a new image to please a wealthy woman who would like to marry him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack pretends he's a doctor to impress his visiting grandfather.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack cooks dinner for a famous food critic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry and Furley attempt to stop the threesome from moving to a luxury beach house.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack botches a cooking demonstration on a local TV talk show.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet dons a blond wig and a new personality.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: A Thanksgiving tornado traps the clan in the cellar.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola believes Bubba is the prime suspect after her pearl necklace disappears.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba may ruin Mama's chance of becoming president of a church club.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi causes problems at home when she decides to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's not in the merriest of moods when she's forced to play Santa at the mall.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Iola's blind date sets his sights on Mama.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: All of the eliminated queens return to battle it out in a Lip Sync Lalaparuza Smackdown, with eight lip syncs, and a cash prize of $50,000 on the line.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The top queens face off in an evening of performances and lip syncs as they compete for a grand prize of $200,000; superstar Liza Minnelli joins RuPaul on stage.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: Ten All Stars arrive in the Werk Room and open the library for a reading mini-challenge -- with surprise guest judge Ricky Martin; next they hit the stage to headline the "Werq the World" Variety Extravaganza; RuPaul reveals new twists in the rules.

programme.desc: The All-Stars form three competing girl-groups to compose lyrics, choreography and perform the new pop crush anthem "I'm In Love!".

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars dive into the world of celebrity branding as they design their own boutique hotel suite experiences.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The stars get overexposed as they improv their way through celebrity scandals and get caught in the act by the tabloid TV team; "Modern Family's" Sarah Hyland joins the judges panel to weigh in.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The best celebrity impressions for a dating show version of the Snatch Game, with guest judges Tommy Dorfman and Jeffery Bowyer Chapman.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars fire up the grill and join RuPaul's family for the Charles Backyard Ball while serving two sizzling looks; Pop star Bebe Rexha joins the party, along with RuPaul's sisters Rozy and Renae.

programme.desc: Mama joins a group that opposes pornography.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba and Mama apply for the same job at a local fast-food stand.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint is certain he was adopted when he discovers some disturbing information on his birth certificate.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama participates in a "Grandma USA" pageant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Bubba enlists in the Army to impress his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's worldly cousin annoys Mama with her lifestyle and her never-ending stories.
